pageContext.name: Loid Forger
pageContext.description: From the hit anime series Spy x Family, the Loid Forger Action Figure joins S.H.Figuarts!  Spy x Family is the hijinks heart filled anime adventure follows infamous spy codenamed: Twilight with his hardest challenge to maintain world peace yet... He has to build a family?!  To execute this mission, he marries a beautiful woman who hides a dark secret, and adopts a young girl named Anya who is secretly a telepath.  The Loid Forger figure includes numerous options for capturing Loid's poses and personality as well as the gun he uses as Twilight. Add to your Spy x Family figure collection today!
